zh.Newington, Rockingham, New Hampshire, Br: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾洛金哈姆聶文頓

zh.Scarborough, Cumberland, Massachusetts B: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼越可爾斯卡波洛
zh.lifeSummary: 當Hepzibah Carter於1725年3月14日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾洛金哈姆聶文頓時，她的父親Richard Carter32歲，母親Sarah Peavey25歲。她於1743年11月24日與Nathaniel Fenderson Sr在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼波藍德斯卡波洛結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1753年1月30日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼越可爾斯卡波洛享年27歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hepzibah Carter于1725年3月14日出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加劍橋大學默里 哈普爾洛金哈姆聶文頓时，她的父亲Richard Carter32岁，母亲Sarah Peavey25岁。她于1743年11月24日与Nathaniel Fenderson Sr在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼波藍德斯卡波洛结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1753年1月30日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼越可爾斯卡波洛享年27岁。

nameMeanings.name: Carter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: occupational name for a transporter of goods, from Middle English carter(e) ‘carter’ (Anglo-Norman French car(e)tier, Old French charetier, medieval Latin carettarius, carettator). The Old French word coalesced with the earlier Middle English word cart(e) ‘cart’, which is from either Old Norse kartr or Old English cræt, both of which, like the Late Latin word, were probably derived from Celtic. This surname is also very common among African Americans.

variants.name: Charman
meanings: English (Sussex and Surrey): occupational name for a carter, carrier, or coachman, from Middle English (Old French) char, car ‘car, cart, carriage’ + Middle English man ‘man’. Compare Carter and Carman 2.

English (Sussex and Surrey): occupational name for someone who did odd jobs, from Middle English char(re), chere (Old English cier(r), cer(r), cear(r), cær(r)) ‘turn (of activity), small job, chore’ + man. Compare Carman 2.
In some cases probably also an Americanized form of Slovenian Čarman (see Carman 5).

variants.name: Chartier
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Armand, Normand, Jacques, Marcel, Adelard, Alcide, Emile, Gilles, Raoul, Rosaire, Alphonse.
French: shortened form of charretier, an occupational name for a carter, from an agent derivative of Old French charette ‘cart’.
French Canadian: altered form of English   Carter  , a cognate of 1 above. Compare   Sharkey   and   Shorkey  .

variants.name: Karter
meanings: German: occupational name for a carder (someone who prepares wool for spinning), from Middle High German karter. Compare Carter .

variants.name: McCarter
meanings: Scottish and northern Irish: variant of   McArthur  .

variants.name: Carrier
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Andre, Marcel, Emile, Lucien, Cecile, Alain, Gaetan, Gilles, Jacques, Laurent, Normand.

English and southern French: from Middle English, Old French car(r)ier (from Late Latin carrarius, a derivative of carrum ‘cart, wagon’, a word of Gaulish origin), an occupational name for a carter (see Carter ), in French also for a cartwright. Compare French Charrier .
French: occupational name for a stonemason or quarryman, carrier. Compare Coyer .

variants.name: Cartman
meanings: English (Yorkshire and Lancashire): occupational name from Middle English cartman ‘man who operated a cart for the transport of goods’. Compare Carter .

nameMeanings.name: Hepzibah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name (meaning ‘my delight is in her’ (i.e. a new-born daughter), borne by the wife of Hezekiah, King of Judah; she was the mother of Manasseh (2 Kings 21). It is also used in the prophecies of Isaiah as an allusive name for the land of Israel (  compare  Beulah  ).

en.lifeSummary: When Hepzibah Carter was born on 14 March 1725, in Newington, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, her father, Richard Carter, was 32 and her mother, Sarah Peavey, was 25. She married Nathaniel Fenderson Sr on 24 November 1743, in Scarborough, Cumberland, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died on 30 January 1753, in Scarborough, Yorkshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 27.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hepzibah Carter est née le 14 mars 1725, à Newington, Rockingham, New Hampshire, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Richard Carter, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Sarah Peavey, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé Nathaniel Fenderson Sr le 24 novembre 1743, à Scarborough, Cumberland, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 30 janvier 1753, à Scarborough, Yorkshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 27 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hepzibah Carter am 14. März 1725 in Newington, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Carter 32 und ihre Mutter Sarah Peavey 25. Sie hat am 24. November 1743 in Scarborough, Cumberland, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Nathaniel Fenderson Sr geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 30. Januar 1753 im Alter von 27 Jahren in Scarborough, Yorkshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Hepzibah Carterが1725年3月14日にイギリス植民地アメリカニュー ハンプシュアイアロクインガムニューイントンで生まれた時，父Richard Carterは32歳，母Sarah Peaveyは25歳であった。1743年11月24日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニークウンバーランドスカーボロウでNathaniel Fenderson Srと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1753年1月30日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーヨークシュアイアスカーボロウで27歳で死去した。

ko.Newington, New Hampshire, British Coloni: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 뉴잉턴

ko.Scarborough, Cumberland, Massachusetts B: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 요르크실르 스카버루그h
ko.lifeSummary: Hepzibah Carter(이)가 1725년 3월 14일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 뉴 함프실르 록잉함 뉴잉턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Carter(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sarah Peavey(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1743년 11월 24일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 c벌랜드 스카버루그h에서 Nathaniel Fenderson Sr(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1753년 1월 30일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 요르크실르 스카버루그h에서 27세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hepzibah Carter nasceu em 14 de março de 1725, em Newington, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, seu pai, Richard Carter, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Sarah Peavey, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com Nathaniel Fenderson Sr em 24 de novembro de 1743, em Scarborough, Cumberland, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 30 de janeiro de 1753, em Scarborough, Yorkshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 27 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hepzibah Carter родилась 14 марта 1725 г. в местности нюингтон, роккингхам, ню хампшир, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Richard Carter было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Sarah Peavey, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Nathaniel Fenderson Sr 24 ноября 1743 г. в местности скарбороую, кумбирланд, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла 30 января 1753 г. в местности скарбороую, еркшир, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 27 лет.

es.14 March 1725–30 January 1753: 14 de marzo de 1725–30 de enero de 1753

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hepzibah Carter nació el 14 de marzo de 1725, en Newington, Rockingham, New Hampshire, British Colonial America, su papá, Richard Carter, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Sarah Peavey, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Nathaniel Fenderson Sr el 24 de noviembre de 1743, en Scarborough, Cumberland, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió el 30 de enero de 1753, en Scarborough, Yorkshire, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 27 años.
